name: Damage Type Template
effect:
[Damage type desc]. If a character is _Downed_ by [DT Name] Damage they suffer the below effects:
* **6-12**: [Injury desc].  Mark a 1 section _Wound_. This _Wound_ has a [X] Segment Clock to heal. While you have this _Wound_:
	* [effects]
* **3-5**: [Injury desc]. Mark a 2 section _Wound_. This _Wound_ has a [X] Segment Clock to heal and, when healed, is replaced by the 1 section _Wound_. While you have this _Wound_:
	* [effects]
* **2-**: [Injury desc]. Mark a 3 section _Wound_. This _Wound_ has a [X] Segment Clock to heal and, when healed, is replaced by the 2 section _Wound_. While you have this _Wound_:
	* [effects]
